title: Future of AI in Web Development
description: Join us for an in-depth look at how AI is reshaping the frontend landscape. Learn how to work with next-gen models, prompt engineering, and automated agents.

agenda.title: Introduction
agenda.desc: Setting the stage for AI in frontend development.

agenda.title: Keynote Address
agenda.desc: A deep dive into prompt engineering, agentic workflows, and UI generations.

agenda.title: Live Q&A Session
agenda.desc: Interactive discussion and audience questions with Dr. Alan Turing.

title: Design Systems 101
description: Learn how to build scalable and consistent UI using modern design system principles and tools like Figma and Storybook.

agenda.title: Why Design Systems?
agenda.desc: Understanding the ROI of consistent UI and design tokens.

agenda.title: Building Your First Component Library
agenda.desc: Hands-on walkthrough of creating flexible, themed components in Figma and React.

agenda.title: Documentation & Handoff
agenda.desc: Best practices for Storybook documentation and developer-designer collaboration.

title: Advanced React Patterns
description: Deep dive into compound components, render props, and custom hooks for cleaner React architecture.

agenda.title: Compound Components
agenda.desc: Building flexible APIs that share implicit state across children.

agenda.title: Hooks Deep Dive
agenda.desc: Creating custom hooks for side effects, data fetching, and state reduction.

agenda.title: Performance Optimization
agenda.desc: Profiling renders, memoization strategies, and avoiding unnecessary re-renders.

title: Cloud Infrastructure Basics
description: A beginner-friendly guide to AWS, Docker, and deploying your first application to the cloud.

agenda.title: Cloud Concepts & AWS Setup
agenda.desc: Understanding regions, availability zones, and core AWS services.

agenda.title: Dockerizing Your App
agenda.desc: Writing Dockerfiles and building containers for local and production environments.

agenda.title: CI/CD & Deployment
agenda.desc: Automating deployments with GitHub Actions and hosting on AWS/EC2.

title: Modern Web Apps
description: Built using modern frameworks like React, Vue, or Angular for faster development.

agenda.title: Getting Started with Modern Web Apps
agenda.desc: • Understanding how modern web applications are structured
